extra.reason: duplicate of workstation-45n
duplicate of workstation-45n

Fixed by commit ebe5cd0: removed the Darwin-local random-socket nvims() override so the packaged deterministic nvims wrapper owns /tmp/nvim-<tmux-pane>.sock; user verified oc-auto-attach works after applying.

Removed all 21 legacy dotfiles-bashrc symlinks plus the GRADUAL MIGRATION / DISABLED PROGRAMS banners and the dotfilesDir/mkOutOfStoreSymlink machinery. Per user (2026-05-18): not migrating any of the snippets into HM — anything not already in workstation is intentionally dropped. Verified with nix build .#darwinConfigurations.Y0FMQX93RR-2.system (succeeded). darwin-rebuild switch deferred to user (sudo password required).

Completed by commit fb097fd: switched pkgs/beads/default.nix fetchFromGitHub owner and meta.homepage from steveyegge to canonical gastownhall; verified /nix/var/nix/profiles/default/bin/nix build .#beads succeeds.

Recovered live DB by importing historical .beads/issues.jsonl from commit 9c2d483, then exported merged DB to tracked .beads/issues.jsonl. Verified workstation-0qg, workstation-0de, and workstation-1lp are readable and exported JSONL contains current workstream beads.

Completed by updating pkgs/beads/default.nix wrapper comment for bd 1.0: removed stale SQLite/inline hook/bd sync --flush-only rationale and documented explicit-hook policy; verified nix build .#beads succeeds.
Removed legacy local .beads SQLite/daemon artifacts (beads.db*, beads.left.*, issues backup, bd.sock, daemon.*). Verified bd still opens embedded Dolt backend at .beads/embeddeddolt.

Rewrote .beads/metadata.json from legacy database/jsonl_export shape to explicit bd 1.0 embedded-Dolt metadata with backend=dolt, dolt_mode=embedded, dolt_database=beads, and project_id. Verified bd context --json reports embedded mode and project_id.

Audited git hooks: macOS local absent; cloudbox absent; devbox had stale bd pre-commit calling 'bd sync --flush-only' and bd post-merge import hook, both removed and verified absent; crostini hostname 'penguin' was not resolvable from macOS, so no remote audit possible here.
Updated AGENTS.md Landing the Plane workflow to remove removed bd sync command and document bd 1.0 dolt.auto-commit plus explicit bd dolt pull/push when a Dolt remote is configured.

Completed by commit 3cb6641: set export.auto=false, export.git-add=false, and import.auto=false in .beads/config.yaml to stop automatic JSONL import/export/staging while bd 1.0 embedded-mode data-loss issues are unresolved.

Completed: switched plan-execution Gemini override to google-vertex/gemini-3.5-flash, added a local Vertex model catalog entry until models.dev/upstream includes it, applied home-manager, and verified opencode-launch can run the model.

Completed: researched Gemini 3.5 Flash thinking levels, set patched Gemini-backed plan-execution agents to variant high, applied home-manager on cloudbox, and verified direct google-vertex/gemini-3.5-flash --variant high smoke test.

Completed PagerDuty MCP wiring, encrypted cloudbox token, setup skill, Nix evaluation/build verification, and PR prep. bd dolt pull could not run because no Dolt remote is configured in this checkout.

Investigation complete: upstream has direct Google/Zen gemini-3.5-flash model data, but no first-class google-vertex/gemini-3.5-flash support yet. Keep local Vertex model overlay; no patch walk-forward performed.

Completed: backported anomalyco/opencode#28669 as opencode-patched gemini-empty-parts.patch, verified patch stack/tests, rebuilt/reuploaded v1.15.0-patched release, updated workstation hashes, applied cloudbox home-manager, and pushed opencode-patched/workstation commits. opencode-serve restart scheduled so future sessions use the new binary.

Completed: cloudbox/macOS OpenCode managed config now defaults to google-vertex/gemini-3.5-flash with high variant for build/plan agents, crostini explicitly matches devbox Opus defaults, and cloudbox home-manager/runtime config was applied and verified.
A/B gate answered: upstream applyCaching matches the fork on Vertex; full drop + thinking-skip validated. First-party empirical confirmation moved to deploy-verification (nvj.4).
Design validated by A/B: full drop of caching.patch, lone survivor = cache-thinking-skip.patch (verified). Recorded in plan doc READY-TO-USE section.

opencode-patched PR #15 merged: dropped caching.patch, added cache-thinking-skip.patch, replaced sync-cached.yml with sync-upstream.yml, updated build-release/check-sunset/README. apply.sh verified end-to-end against pristine v1.15.13.

WON'T DO (user decision): the thinking-skip is defensive code with no reproducible trigger (reasoning normally first, not last in content); #17883 is a different repro so 'Fixes #' would be inaccurate; anomalyco/opencode vouch/denounce + anti-AI-PR culture makes a low-confidence PR under johnnymo87 identity a bad trade. Keeping local cache-thinking-skip.patch as cheap defensive insurance. check-sunset.yml still tracks #17883 as the (loose) sunset signal.
